description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized banana with a smooth, slightly curved form and a pale yellow peel. The peel is mostly intact, with a few minor blemishes and a small brown spot near the stem. The stem is short and slightly dried, while the tip is rounded and unbroken. The banana's surface is matte with a subtle sheen, and the overall shape is gently arched, typical of a Cavendish banana. No commercial stickers or labels are visible on the peel. The banana appears clean and free from any visible debris or litter in its immediate surroundings.
description: A pale yellow, gently curved banana with a smooth, matte peel and minor blemishes near the stem.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length and gentle curvature of the banana, with the stem on the left and tip on the right.
description_view_1: End-on view from the stem, highlighting the width and slight flattening of the banana's cross-section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the banana's curvature and the tip on the left, stem on the right.
description_view_3: End-on view from the tip, showing the rounded end and the stem receding into the background.
attribute_peel_condition: The banana's peel is mostly intact with a few minor blemishes and a small brown spot near the stem. There are no visible tears, splits, or signs of peeling.
